description.value:
**Benefit:** When you channel energy, you can choose a number of targets in the area up to your Charisma modifier. These targets are not affected by your channeled energy.

**Normal:** All targets in a 30-foot burst are affected when you channel energy. You can only choose whether or not you are affected. Editor’s Note Do I have to be able to see a creature in order to exclude them from the effect of my channeled energy? Just like using a Target: creature spell, you must be able to see or touch a creature to affect it (or, in the case of this feat, select it to be unaffected). Pinpointing the square of an invisible creature isn’t sufficientâyou must be able to see or touch the creature. Note that this works differently than an alchemist ‘s precise bombs discovery, which allows the alchemist to exclude *squares* from his bomb’s splash area (not targets). [ Source ]
